title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates
company: Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates:
Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Malabar Gold & Diamonds Asia Pacific Associates!
